title: alyssum myriophyllum
intro: Alyssum myriophyllum, also known as water alyssum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial aquatic plant that grows in shallow water and is native to Europe and Asia. Alyssum myriophyllum is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health benefits.
